mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, study_count, review_count, correct_rate, study_date, create_time, update_time FROM study_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND study_date = #{studyDate} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO study_record (user_id, study_date, study_count, review_count, correct_rate) VALUES (#{userId}, #{studyDate}, #{studyCount}, #{reviewCount}, #{correctRate})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, study_count, review_count, correct_rate, study_date, create_time, update_time FROM study_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND study_date >= #{startDate} ORDER BY study_date ASC

SELECT id, user_id, study_count, review_count, correct_rate, study_date, create_time, update_time FROM study_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND study_date >= #{startDate} AND study_date < #{endDate} ORDER BY study_date ASC
